svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/27.0.5 Chrome/134.0.6998.205 Electron/35.3.0 Safari/537.36" version="27.0.5" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="_60JyyDE_Nv5vHZ2jTEY"> <mxGraphModel dx="1426" dy="849" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-1" value="RASPBERRY PI 5
Database Server" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="260" width="120" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-2" value="SERVER
Backend / API" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="260" width="120" height="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-11" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-3" target="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-3" value="ROUTER
Network Gateway" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="479" y="260" width="120" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-4" value="DEVICES WITH LABVIEW
Clients / Test Controllers" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="699" y="259" width="150" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-5" value="Database Queries" style="curved=1;startArrow=classic;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=0;startFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-1" target="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-6" value="Network Traffic" style="curved=1;startArrow=classic;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=0;startFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-2" target="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-7" value="Ethernet/WiFi" style="curved=1;startArrow=classic;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=0;startFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-3" target="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-10" value="ODBC/API Calls" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.25;exitY=0;rounded=0;startFill=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;dashed=1;entryX=0.75;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-4" target="73taKHP0jQzjQHP-bw1Z-1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="720" y="230" /> <mxPoint x="440" y="230" /> <mxPoint x="150" y="230" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="630" y="310" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="120" y="210" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
